---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Teaching — Rodrigo Hermont Ozon"
description: "Teaching activities of Rodrigo Hermont Ozon: current courses at FAE Business School, teaching history, certifications and open teaching materials."
toc: false
---

::: {.rh-section}
```{=html}
<div class="rh-kicker">NOW TEACHING</div>
```

## FAE Business School

```{=html}
<div class="rh-card">
  <h3>Undergraduate Professor — FAE Business School</h3>
  <p><strong>Feb 2025 – Present · Curitiba, PR</strong></p>
  <p>Teaching undergraduate courses in Data Science for Business and Financial Markets:</p>
  <ul>
    <li><strong>Big Data for Finance Project</strong> — data science and big data techniques applied to financial decision-making.</li>
    <li><strong>Computational Programming</strong> — fundamentals and applications in data analytics and business intelligence.</li>
    <li><strong>Risk Management</strong> — quantitative methods and practical tools for financial risk assessment and mitigation.</li>
    <li><strong>Econometrics</strong> — regression diagnostics, causal inference, panel and time-series methods, and policy/market applications.</li>
    <li><strong>Project Appraisal and Investment Analysis</strong> — DCF modeling, NPV/IRR, sensitivity and scenario analysis, Monte Carlo simulation, and real options.</li>
  </ul>
  <p>
    <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-primary" href="https://profrhozon.github.io/site/" target="_blank">Visit the class site</a>
  </p>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.rh-section}
```{=html}
<div class="rh-kicker">TEACHING HISTORY</div>
```

## Earlier appointments

```{=html}
<div class="rh-timeline">

  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">Aug 2024</div>
    <h3>Postgraduate Professor — Executive MBA</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">ESIC International – Curitiba, PR</div>
    <p>Taught a 12-hour module on Investments in the Executive MBA: evaluation criteria, risk, inflation impact, fiscal environment, and strategic investments.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">Jan – Dec 2011</div>
    <h3>Graduate Professor</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">FESP/PR – Curitiba, PR</div>
    <p>Taught the Project Integration course in the Graduate Program in Project Management, based on PMBOK practices.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">Jan 2009 – Dec 2011</div>
    <h3>Undergraduate Professor</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">INESUL – Araucária, PR</div>
    <p>Taught Financial Mathematics, Financial Management, SPC, Business Informatics, and Industry Performance Indicators. Coordinated Research and Graduate Studies from Jul 2009 to Mar 2010.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">Jan 2009 – Dec 2010</div>
    <h3>Undergraduate Professor</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">Universidade Positivo – Curitiba, PR</div>
    <p>Taught Financial Markets, Monetary and Financial Economics, and Quantitative Methods for Business students.</p>
  </div>

</div>
```
:::

::: {.rh-section}
```{=html}
<div class="rh-kicker">CERTIFICATIONS &amp; CONTINUED EDUCATION</div>
```

## Always learning

Continuous training in econometrics, finance, and data science from leading institutions and platforms. Highlights:

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:.5rem; margin:1rem 0;">
  <span class="rh-pill">IBM Data Science Professional Certificate (144h)</span>
  <span class="rh-pill">Econometrics: Methods &amp; Applications — Erasmus Rotterdam (56h)</span>
  <span class="rh-pill">Financial Markets — Yale University (38h)</span>
  <span class="rh-pill">The R Programming Environment — Johns Hopkins (16h)</span>
  <span class="rh-pill">ETL and ELT in Python — DataCamp (2025)</span>
  <span class="rh-pill">~40 DataCamp / Dataquest courses in R, Python, SQL &amp; ML</span>
</div>
<p>
  <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-ghost" href="cv.html#certifications">See the full list on the CV</a>
</p>
```
:::

::: {.rh-section}
```{=html}
<div class="rh-kicker">OPEN TEACHING MATERIALS</div>
```

## Free tutorials and classes

```{=html}
<div class="rh-card">
  <h3>Public tutorials in econometrics, ML and data science</h3>
  <p>More than 30 open-access tutorials and applied classes covering econometrics, machine learning, time series forecasting, and data science — written in R and Python and freely available online.</p>
  <p>
    <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-primary" href="https://rhozon.github.io/selecaodeprodutosnor/index.html" target="_blank">Browse the tutorials</a>
  </p>
</div>
```
:::
